scripts.cf:dev: pnpm run cf:build && pnpm dlx wrangler dev
scripts.cf:deploy: pnpm run cf:build && pnpm dlx wrangler deploy
scripts.cf:d1:create: pnpm dlx wrangler d1 create clipboard-db
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:local: pnpm dlx wrangler d1 migrations apply clipboard-db --local
scripts.cf:d1:migrate:remote: pnpm dlx wrangler d1 migrations apply clipboard-db --remote
